props.description: Determines if the bottom sheet is shown or not.
props.title: open

props.description:
Callback fired when the component requests to be closed (overlay press, close control, Escape, or a downward dismiss gesture).
() => void;
props.title: onRemove

props.description: Ordered list of heights the sheet can snap to. Each entry is a viewport-height percentage (e.g. "60%") or the keyword "full".
props.title: snapPoints

props.description: Index within snapPoints used as the initial snap point.
props.title: defaultSnap

props.description: Content of the sheet. Compose with BottomSheet.Header, BottomSheet.Body and BottomSheet.Footer.
props.title: children

props.description:
Controls whether pressing outside should close the sheet.
- boolean: enable/disable dismissal on outside press
- function: receive the DOM event and return true to allow closing
props.title: closeOnOutsidePress

props.description: The attribute name to ignore when checking for outside presses, so portaled Popover/Modal content does not close the sheet.
props.title: ignoreAttributeName

props.description: Determines if background scroll is locked while the sheet is open.
props.title: needRemoveScroll

props.description: z-index of the sheet layer. High enough to cover the mobile nav bar.
props.title: zIndex

props.description: Root element where the portal should be mounted. When provided and not null, the portal renders inside this element; otherwise it renders into document.body. Useful to scope the sheet within a container (e.g., AppShell.Chat).
props.title: root

props.description: The content of the sheet header. Accepts any node (title, actions, icons).
props.title: children

props.description: The padding around the header content area.
props.title: padding

props.description: The scrollable content of the sheet.
props.title: children

props.description: The padding around the body content area.
props.title: padding

props.description: The content of the sheet footer.
props.title: children

props.description: The padding around the footer content area.
props.title: padding
